ddls:
CREATE TABLE "communities" (
  "community_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each community */,
  "community_name" TEXT /* Name of the community */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the community is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the community */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the community */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the community */,
  "average_income" REAL /* Average income in the community */,
  "energy_consumption" REAL /* Current energy consumption in kWh */,
  "main_economic_activities" TEXT /* Main economic activities in the community */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("community_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "community_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the community involved in the project */,
  "technology" TEXT /* Type of technology used in the project (e.g., Microgrids, Hydropower) */,
  "brief_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the project objectives and goals */,
  "partner_url" TEXT /* URL for more information on regional partners involved */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Total budget allocated for the project */,
  "funding_sources" TEXT /* Sources of funding for the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., planned, ongoing, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_community_id FOREIGN KEY ("community_id") REFERENCES communities ("community_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regional_partners" (
  "partner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each partner */,
  "partner_name" TEXT /* Name of the regional partner organization */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL for the partner's website */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the primary contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("partner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technologies" (
  "technology_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technology type */,
  "technology_name" TEXT /* Name of the technology (e.g., Microgrids, Solar, Hydropower) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the technology */,
  "cost_per_unit" REAL /* Cost of implementing the technology per unit */,
  "efficiency" REAL /* Efficiency of the technology in percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("technology_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "qualifications" (
  "qualification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each qualification */,
  "qualification_type" TEXT /* Type of qualification (e.g., Remote, Island) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the qualification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("qualification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "community_qualifications" (
  "community_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the community */,
  "qualification_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the qualification */,
  "qualification_date" TEXT /* Date when the community received the qualification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("community_id", "qualification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_technologies" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "technology_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the technology */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the technology used in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "technology_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_partners" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "partner_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the regional partner */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the partner in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "partner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_descriptions" (
  "description_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the description */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated project */,
  "detailed_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project including objectives, impact, and expected outcomes */,
  "objectives" TEXT /* Detailed list of project objectives */,
  "benefits" TEXT /* Detailed list of expected benefits */,
  "risks" TEXT /* Detailed list of potential risks */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("description_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_descriptions_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy usage record */,
  "community_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the community */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "energy_saved" REAL /* Amount of energy saved after project implementation in kWh */,
  "pre_project_energy_usage" REAL /* Energy usage before the project in kWh */,
  "reduction_percentage" REAL /* Percentage reduction in energy usage */,
  "post_project_date" TEXT /* Date of the post-project analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_usage_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_usage_community_id FOREIGN KEY ("community_id") REFERENCES communities ("community_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "impact_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each impact report */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project being reported on */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "carbon_reduction" REAL /* Estimated carbon reduction achieved by the project in tons */,
  "water_savings" REAL /* Estimated water savings achieved by the project in cubic meters */,
  "air_quality_improvement" REAL /* Improvement in air quality in parts per million (ppm) */,
  "economic_impact" TEXT /* Economic impact of the project (e.g., job creation) */,
  "social_impact" TEXT /* Social impact of the project (e.g., community well-being) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_impact_reports_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "community_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback submission */,
  "community_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the community providing feedback */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the relevant project */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback provided */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "suggestions" TEXT /* Suggestions provided by the community */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date when feedback was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_community_feedback_community_id FOREIGN KEY ("community_id") REFERENCES communities ("community_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_community_feedback_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_stakeholders" (
  "stakeholder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stakeholder */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project they are involved in */,
  "stakeholder_name" TEXT /* Name of the stakeholder */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the stakeholder (e.g., project manager, community leader) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the stakeholder represents */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the stakeholder */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stakeholder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_stakeholders_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project associated with the event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date the event will take place */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the event in hours */,
  "number_of_participants" INTEGER /* Number of participants in the event */,
  "feedback_summary" TEXT /* Summary of feedback received from the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
